name: bpel2orkes
description: Convert IBM WS-BPEL 2.0 workflows to Orkes Conductor automatically. Migrate IBM BPM, WebSphere Process Server, and TIBCO BPEL processes to deployment-ready Orkes Conductor JSON in minutes instead of weeks.
author: Kshetra

authentication.description: API key from bpel2orkes.kshetra.studio. Sign in with GitHub - 50 free conversions included.

tools.name: convert_bpel
tools.description: Convert an IBM WS-BPEL 2.0 XML process definition to Orkes Conductor workflow JSON. Returns deployment-ready workflow JSON, a migration complexity assessment (green/amber/red), and a link to a visual flow diagram.

bpel_xml.description: IBM WS-BPEL 2.0 XML process definition as a string

tools.name: get_migration_tips
tools.description: Given the warnings from a conversion, return a structured migration guide with recommended actions for each flagged construct.

assessment.description: The assessment object returned from convert_bpel

tools.name: validate_on_orkes
tools.description: Convert BPEL XML and register the main workflow on an Orkes Conductor instance for immediate testing.
